style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontFamily=Verdana;verticalAlign=middle;align=center;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;glass=0;dashed=1;spacingLeft=0;spacingBottom=0;spacingRight=0;spacing=10;spacingTop=0;" value="<div align="left">COMS forwards remote data it receives to COGS</div><div align="left">Implementation for forwarding storeC remote records to COGS is simple due to sync queue via changelog.&nbsp;</div><div align="left">Similarly, central data that arrives from COGS is pulled by COMS, and then ROMS pulls it from COMS</div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="380" x="-50" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="JXoAO7nAC1h61vNbkEMG-51" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontFamily=Verdana;verticalAlign=middle;align=left;dashed=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;spacing=10;" value="<div align="left">Above V7 API allows for COMS to be stand alone from COGS with all configurations in COMS.&nbsp;</div><div align="left">Or in-between where most configurations are still in&nbsp;COGS&nbsp;(apart from ROMS sites).&nbsp;</div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="710" x="-440" y="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="GfkldGfJJZw6D9_p5PVQ-3" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;dashed=1;spacing=10;" value="<div>storeC is added to omSupply central site (COMS) in OG Central (COGS).</div><div>From COGS perspective storeC is active on COMS </div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="310" x="-450" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell div.div: COMS forwards remote data it receives to COGS
Implementation for forwarding storeC remote records to COGS is simple due to sync queue via changelog.
Similarly, central data that arrives from COGS is pulled by COMS, and then ROMS pulls it from COMS

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 692px; height: 1px; padding-top: 555px; margin-left: 40px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Verdana; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.div: Above V7 API allows for COMS to be stand alone from COGS with all configurations in COMS.
Or in-between where most configurations are still in COGS (apart from ROMS sites).

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 398px; height: 1px; padding-top: 15px; margin-left: 31px;

div.font: Sync V7 with V5 and V6

path.style: stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.div: storeC is added to omSupply central site (COMS) in OG Central (COGS).
From COGS perspective storeC is active on COMS

div.div:
COGS - Central mSupply
COMS - Central open mSupply
ROG - Remote mSupply
ROMS - Remote open mSupply
